# Psalms 139

## Verses (24)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O Lord, you have knowledge of me, searching out all my secrets. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | You have knowledge when I am seated and when I get up, you see my thoughts from far away. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | You keep watch over my steps and my sleep, and have knowledge of all my ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For there is not a word on my tongue which is not clear to you, O Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | I am shut in by you on every side, and you have put your hand on me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Such knowledge is a wonder greater than my powers; it is so high that I may not come near it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Where may I go from your spirit? how may I go in flight from you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | If I go up to heaven, you are there: or if I make my bed in the underworld, you are there. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | If I take the wings of the morning, and go to the farthest parts of the sea; | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Even there will I be guided by your hand, and your right hand will keep me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | If I say, Only let me be covered by the dark, and the light about me be night; | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Even the dark is not dark to you; the night is as bright as the day: for dark and light are the same to you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | My flesh was made by you, and my parts joined together in my mother's body. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | I will give you praise, for I am strangely and delicately formed; your works are great wonders, and of this my soul is fully conscious. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | My frame was not unseen by you when I was made secretly, and strangely formed in the lowest parts of the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Your eyes saw my unformed substance; in your book all my days were recorded, even those which were purposed before they had come into being. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | How dear are your thoughts to me, O God! how great is the number of them! | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | If I made up their number, it would be more than the grains of sand; when I am awake, I am still with you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | If only you would put the sinners to death, O God; go far from me, you men of blood. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | For they go against you with evil designs, and your haters make sport of your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Are not your haters hated by me, O Lord? are not those who are lifted up against you a cause of grief to me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | My hate for them is complete; my thoughts of them are as if they were making war on me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | O God, let the secrets of my heart be uncovered, and let my wandering thoughts be tested: | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | See if there is any way of sorrow in me, and be my guide in the eternal way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
